privileged_info_summary: The task involves adding a synthetic address book entry to LibreHealth EHR for Elena Rodriguez, a referring physician. The data is entirely synthetic (test data), not based on real patient data. The task description specifies the entry should have organization 'City General Hospital - Cardiology Department', specialty 'Cardiology', phone (555) 482-7100 (normalized to 5554827100), fax (555) 482-7101 (normalized to 5554827101), email e.rodriguez@citygeneral.example.org, and address '450 Medical Center Drive, Springfield, MA 01103'. Two metadata fields contain incomplete values: expected_org omits the '- Cardiology Department' suffix, and expected_street is truncated to '450 Medical Center' instead of the full '450 Medical Center Drive'. These truncations appear intentional for substring matching in the verifier logic.
